name: One Bowl Peanut Butter Fudge2
recipeInstructions:
1. MICROWAVE the chocolate and milk in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2-3 minutes, or until the chocolate is almost melted. Stir halfway through the heating time.
2. Continue stirring until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. STIR in the vanilla extract.
4. SPREAD the mixture into a foil-lined 8-inch square pan.
5. DROP teaspoonfuls of peanut butter on top of the fudge and SWIRL with a knife to marbleize.
6. REFRIGERATE for 2 hours or until firm. Cut into squares.
